summary: Summary: The conversation began with Speaker1 in surprise, quickly shifting to excited and happiness as Speaker2 recounted his weekend. Speaker2, excited and happiness, described proposing at Yosemite—asking his partner to pose by a waterfall, pretending to slip into the pool, then emerging with a ring and proposing; Speaker1 helped him out and responded with surprise and happiness when the partner said yes. The pair then moved into engagement and wedding plans, both excited and happiness about a small Midwest ceremony and sharing the moment with loved ones. In the final phase Speaker2, excited and sometimes neutral, discussed living together and future children (partner wanted eight, they agreed on three) and telling parents; Speaker1 reacted with surprise, increased excited and happiness. Overall the conversation remained positive, dominated by excited and happiness.
